positive: A sophisticated, minimalist watercolor-style illustration of a stylized celestial map, depicting interconnected constellations of geometric lines and vibrant nebulae dust. The central focus is a majestic, stylized crescent moon emerging from swirling sapphire and amethyst cosmic gas. The design should feature clean, bold outlines contrasting against soft gradients of teal, gold, and deep indigo. Emphasize negative space and symmetry, making it ideal for printing on fabric. Flat lay composition, high contrast silhouette art, vector illustration aesthetic, graphic design for apparel, clean lines, detailed texture.
